testcase.system-err: Mar 22, 2026 3:57:46 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 145 Mar 22, 2026 3:57:46 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$4 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 145.0.7632.159. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.34.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
